Hero.description: I build fast, accessible React interfaces that feel as good as they look. Based in Karlsruhe · Open to remote & hybrid roles.

About.title: About Me
About.paragraph1: I'm a Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience building performant, accessible web interfaces using React, TypeScript, and Next.js. I translate complex requirements into clean, maintainable UI architectures — and I care just as much about the code behind the screen as the experience in front of it.
About.paragraph2: I've shipped production applications across agency, SaaS, and freelance environments — collaborating with designers, backend engineers, and stakeholders to deliver responsive, scalable products on time. I'm currently seeking frontend roles in Karlsruhe, Stuttgart, Mannheim, or fully remote.

Resume.title: Resume
Resume.intro: Frontend Developer with a Computer Software Engineering degree and 5+ years of experience building responsive, accessible web applications with React, TypeScript, and Next.js. Experienced across the full stack with Node.js, Express, and REST APIs. Certified in professional German (telc B2) and seeking a frontend role in a collaborative, product-focused team.
Resume.expCalvergy: Rebuilt core sections of a live SaaS platform (Hero, Advantages, How It Works) in React, Next.js, and TypeScript — implementing English/German localization and delivering responsive, consistent UI across all breakpoints. Earned a 'sehr gut' (very good) written reference for reliability and code quality.
Resume.expFreelance: Designed and shipped production websites for paying clients, including Adler Reinigung (React) and a WordPress festival site. Built CineBoard, a full-stack movie app (React 19, TypeScript, Node.js/Express, MongoDB) with JWT auth and a custom debounced-search hook that eliminated redundant TMDB API calls.
Resume.expNaarvan: Reduced annual client maintenance costs by up to 35% by developing and maintaining three internal platforms in React, TypeScript, and SCSS. Integrated Drupal CMS using Twig templating and accelerated team delivery through code reviews and pair-programming in an Agile environment.
Resume.expRahavard: Increased organic traffic by 40% by producing SEO-optimized web content and collaborating with designers on accessible, responsive landing pages — contributing to stronger user engagement through intuitive layout decisions.

projects.title: Selected Work
projects.description: Production-ready applications and platforms built with React, TypeScript, and Next.js — each solving a real problem with a clean, scalable frontend.
projects.project1_desc: Engineered a full-stack movie discovery app with React 19, TypeScript, and JWT auth — featuring a custom debounced search hook that eliminated redundant TMDB API requests and delivered a faster, cleaner experience than existing platforms.
projects.project2_desc: Shipped the complete frontend for a live SaaS corporate platform using Next.js and Tailwind CSS — translating complex product logic into a structured, responsive interface with English/German multilingual support.
projects.project3_desc: Led frontend development in a cross-functional MERN team — architecting an intuitive pet adoption browsing experience with a clean component structure and responsive layout across all device sizes.
projects.project4_desc: Designed and deployed a conversion-focused business website for a German client — structuring content hierarchy and a mobile-first layout to drive service enquiries from local search traffic.
